c.d: Ability to facilitate real-time and asynchronous communication among team members through messaging, audio, and video calls.
Features for organizing, assigning, and tracking tasks, deadlines, and progress.
Capabilities for sharing documents, images, and other files, along with cloud storage for accessibility.
Seamless integration with other commonly used apps and services (e.g., Google Drive, Microsoft Office, etc.).
Enables multiple users to work on the same document or project simultaneously, with instant updates and feedback.
Provides a digital canvas for brainstorming, ideation, and visual planning.
The degree to which the tool can be tailored to fit specific team needs and workflows.
Ease of use and intuitive design for all team members.
